findings.description: The knowledge file omits @PropertyName("都道府県") and @Required from the equivalent annotation code for setPrefectureCode. The source shows all three annotations (@PropertyName, @Required, @CodeValue) as equivalent to the Map-based ValidationUtil.validate() call, but the knowledge file shows only @CodeValue. This misrepresents what the explicit validator call is semantically equivalent to.
The @PropertyName annotation appears in both code examples in the source but is absent from the hints list.
findings.source_evidence: @PropertyName("昼間連絡先電話番号") and @PropertyName("都道府県") appear in the two annotation-equivalent code blocks in the source.
